chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3569 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنِ اَلْعَالِمِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : "اِعْمَلْ لِدُنْيَاكَ كَأَنَّكَ تَعِيشُ أَبَداً وَ اِعْمَلْ لآِخِرَتِكَ كَأَنَّكَ تَمُوتُ غَداً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3569 - It is narrated from the Imam (as) that he said:
"Work for your worldly life as if you will live forever, and work for your Hereafter as if you will die tomorrow."
